---
title: "Anthony Faustine"
subtitle: "Principal ML Engineer<br>Analog Devices, Ireland"
pagetitle: "Anthony Faustine | Portfolio"
description-meta: "Principal ML Engineer and systems architect focused on designing and running machine learning systems at scale for supply chain and edge applications at Analog Devices, Ireland."

about:
  id: hero-heading
  template: trestles
  image: ../../images/profiles/sambaiga_profile.jpg
  image-alt: "Professional headshot of Anthony Faustine"
  image-width: 18em


format:
  html:
    body-class: "about"
grid:
  body-width: 1200px
author-meta: Anthony Faustine
---
::: {#hero-heading .text-justify .text-md-start}
I'm a **Principal ML Engineer** at [Analog Devices](https://www.analog.com) in Ireland. I design and ship machine learning systems that support supply chain decisions and intelligent edge products. Over the past decade, I’ve worked across manufacturing, industrial, energy and semiconductor domains, taking ideas from early prototypes to reliable production systems.

My focus is end to end ML systems at scale and strategic technology management. I care about clean architecture, robust model deployment, and strong monitoring and governance once systems are in production. I work closely with business and product leaders to make sure investments in AI and analytics translate into clear, measurable value for the organisation.

I also spend much of my time mentoring engineers and collaborating with product and operations teams so that ML work stays aligned with real world problems and long term strategy.

Alongside my industry role, I am active in research and development. I collaborate with [Lucas Pereira](https://www.alspereira.info/) at ITI, LARSyS, Técnico Lisboa on machine learning and data analytics solutions for clean energy systems and the broader energy transition.


> My mission: architect and deliver ML systems that solve real business problems with measurable impact.

### Ready to collaborate?
I'm always open to discussing new opportunities, research collaborations, technical speaking engagements, or mentoring emerging AI engineers.



::: {.hero-actions .d-flex .justify-content-center .gap-3 .mt-4}
[Schedule a Chat <i class="bi bi-calendar me-2"></i>](https://calendly.com/sambaiga){.btn .btn-primary .btn-sm}
[Download CV <i class="bi bi-download me-2"></i>](/files/Anthony_CV_2026_ADI.pdf){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-sm}
:::
:::
